title: Provider Runner Beta (#538) — Freshness/Budget/Approval Gates + Run Ledger

learning_candidates.summary: Gate-first pipeline pattern: 6 gates before provider execution — manifest → freshness → budget → approval → circuit_breaker → apply_live_call → executor
learning_candidates.evidence: Validated across all 6 pipeline gates (specifier through ops), PR #547 merged

learning_candidates.summary: Provider runner is Node CLI/runner, NOT Cloudflare Worker — confirmed by all gates
learning_candidates.evidence: PLAN, CODE REVIEW (11/11), QA (7/7), OPS all validated this architectural decision
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as durable infrastructure fact for Growth OS

learning_candidates.summary: ProviderRunLedgerRow TS type missing locale/market/entity_key/action_key columns from DB migration
learning_candidates.recommended_action: align TS type with DB schema for production readiness (#539/#540)

learning_candidates.summary: Circuit breaker lacks UI for manual reset
learning_candidates.evidence: Documented in plan but not implemented in #538

learning_candidates.summary: cost_requires_owner_issue field unused in gate logic
Registry hardening: migrate manifest.ts → dynamic .mjs registry import
learning_candidates.evidence: Static subset used for beta due to Jest ESM friction
learning_candidates.recommended_action: resolve ESM friction and restore dynamic import

title: ColombiaTours public routing recovery (Week 1) — system fallback pages for contacto/prensa

learning_candidates.summary: System fallback page pattern: narrow known-alias override for soft-404 routes, synthetic WebsitePage objects, multi-tenant safe, does not mask unrelated 404s
learning_candidates.evidence: Validated across 4 gates (PLAN, CODE, QA, OPS) for ColombiaTours Week 1 routing recovery

learning_candidates.summary: Live audit scoring methodology: P0-P3 severity framework across route matrix with HTTP status, content rendering, console errors, and verifiable reproduction steps per finding
learning_candidates.evidence: T2 live audit produced 213-line report scoring ColombiaTours at 4.5/10 with 12 findings across 21 routes
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as durable quality-audit methodology for bukeer-site-recovery pipeline

learning_candidates.summary: Pipeline architecture for site recovery: T0 spec -> T1 plan gate -> T2 live audit (baseline) -> T3 dev -> T4 code gate -> T5 QA gate -> T6 ops -> T7 learning capture
learning_candidates.evidence: Validated across 7 tasks in ColombiaTours public-routing-recovery-w1 pipeline, all completed
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as reusable recovery pipeline template for future tenant recovery sprints

learning_candidates.summary: Fallback pages locale awareness: lib/site/system-fallback-pages.ts hardcodes Spanish content strings - needs locale parameter + content generation by locale for multi-tenant safety
learning_candidates.evidence: T4 code gate and T5 QA gate both flagged as non-blocking debt
learning_candidates.recommended_action: create bug/tech-debt issue for Week 2 sprint

learning_candidates.summary: middleware.ts normalizeBlogPublicLocale() maps pt -> pt-PT while locale-routing.ts LEGACY_BLOG_LOCALE_MAP maps pt -> pt-BR - inconsistent and can cause routing failures for PT-BR tenants
learning_candidates.evidence: T1 plan gate WARN and earlier PT-BR blog routing fix (PR #549) both identified this root cause
learning_candidates.recommended_action: create bug issue for Week 1 (blocking for PT-BR tenants)

learning_candidates.summary: ColombiaTours i18n translations missing for PT/FR/DE locales - users see Spanish content with correct language switcher labels
learning_candidates.evidence: T2 live audit: P1 finding across 3 locale routes, confirmed by route matrix
learning_candidates.recommended_action: create content/translation issue for Week 2 sprint

learning_candidates.summary: /buscar page title duplicates site name: 'Buscar | ColombiaTours.Travel | ColombiaTours.Travel'
learning_candidates.evidence: T2 live audit: P1 finding, verified via browser title inspection
learning_candidates.recommended_action: create minor bug issue for Week 2 sprint

learning_candidates.summary: No PR-target CI pipeline - CI runs on push to main only; typecheck/lint/tests not gated on PR creation
learning_candidates.evidence: T6 ops gate observation: PR #551 created without automatic CI validation
learning_candidates.recommended_action: create ops/CI issue to add GitHub Actions workflow for PR checks
